server_checkpoint.summary: Passed. Ran 203 tests across 6 files: 203 pass, 0 fail, 1126 expect() calls. Workflow runtime, final report, summary, sessions API, compact carryover, and tool-policy checkpoint coverage all passed.
notes: Expected noisy test logs were present from session/worktree fixtures, including git branch/worktree setup and a simulated unlink failure path inside sessions.test.ts, but the suite completed successfully.

desktop_checkpoint.command: cd desktop && bun run test -- --run src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx src/pages/ActiveSession.test.tsx src/stores/sessionStore.test.ts
desktop_checkpoint.summary: Passed. Ran 85 tests across 3 files: 85 pass, 0 fail.
notes: Workflow status panel, active session rendering, and session store merge/preservation checks all passed in the focused US3 lane.

checks.name: prompt_emphasis_is_advisory_only
evidence: src/server/services/workflowRuntimeService.ts formats an explicit 'Active phase recommended skills' block that says recommendations are advisory only.
The same prompt block states recommendations do not grant tool permissions, change model/effort settings, open shells, fork work, install hooks, or schedule SkillTool calls.
workflowRuntimeService.test.ts passed the explicit prompt-assembly checkpoint for persisted recommended-skill snapshots without scheduling SkillTool calls.

checks.name: unavailable_or_degraded_skills_are_marked_not_auto_invoked
evidence: src/server/services/workflowRuntimeService.ts separates available recommendations from degraded statuses in the persisted phase snapshot prompt block.
src/server/services/workflowSummary.ts projects recommendedSkillStatus from persisted snapshots rather than recomputing or invoking anything.
Focused server and desktop test lanes passed unavailable/degraded rendering and no-auto-invocation expectations.

checks.name: bounded_evidence_in_report_summary_status_and_resume_paths
evidence: src/server/services/workflowFinalReport.ts builds recommendedSkills from bounded snapshots/evidence only.
src/server/services/workflowSummary.ts exposes concise recommendedSkillStatus including activePhaseItems.
src/services/compact/workflowSummaryCarryover.test.ts passed the bounded carryover evidence checkpoint.
desktop/src/components/workflow/WorkflowStatusPanel.tsx filters active recommended-skill items to relevant evidence-bearing or unavailable/degraded entries and limits visible items.

checks.name: pending_confirmation_priority_beats_stale_running_status
evidence: desktop/src/components/workflow/WorkflowStatusPanel.tsx displayStatus() returns pending-confirmation whenever workflow.pendingConfirmation is true before considering workflow.status.
WorkflowComponents.test.tsx and ActiveSession.test.tsx both passed the pending-confirmation priority assertions in the exact checkpoint run.

checks.name: forbidden_drift_absent
evidence: No auto-exec or default completion gate behavior was observed; workflow completion still routes through submit_phase_completion and pending confirmation semantics.
src/server/services/workflowToolPolicy.ts explicitly states recommended phase skills do not grant tool permissions and do not enable SkillTool globally.

No plugin-primary binding, default bundle contents, or SkillTool permission/model/effort/fork/shell/hook bypass surfaced in the runtime prompt, policy guidance, summary/report shaping, or desktop status lane.

recovery_hints: If this checkpoint regresses later, rerun the same two focused commands before widening to broader quality gates.
If the server lane flakes on Windows in future runs, inspect sessions.test.ts worktree/temp-directory fixture behavior first; this run passed cleanly despite expected noisy fixture logs.
